targets.rawSql:
DECLARE @Text VARCHAR(MAX) = ''
    DECLARE @sSQL VARCHAR(MAX) = ''
    DECLARE @nSQL nVARCHAR(MAX) = ''


    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TempResult') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE #TempResult 

    CREATE TABLE #TempResult(
          time datetime
        , SVR_Drive nvarchar(20)
        , DiskUtilization decimal(5,2)
    )

    INSERT INTO #TempResult (time, SVR_Drive, DiskUtilization)
    SELECT 
      DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, dku.CollectDate) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) AS time
      , ins.ServerName+ ' '+ CASE WHEN dku.Drive LIKE '\\%' THEN 'NAS' ELSE dku.Drive END AS [SVR_Drive]
      , ISNULL (MAX(CONVERT(decimal(5, 2), ROUND((ISNULL(dku.TotalSpaceMB,dt.TotalSpaceMB) - dku.FreeSpaceMB) / ISNULL(dku.TotalSpaceMB,dt.TotalSpaceMB) *100, 2))), 0) AS [DiskUtilization]
    FROM [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] AS ins 
    INNER JOIN [dbo].[TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage] AS dku ON ins.InstanceID = dku.InstanceID
 INNER JOIN (
			SELECT T1.InstanceID
			      ,T1.Drive
			  FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage] T1
			      ,(
				      SELECT InstanceID
						        ,MAX(CollectDate) AS CollectDate
					    FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage]
					   WHERE 1=1
					     AND $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
					   GROUP BY InstanceID
				   ) T2
			 WHERE T1.InstanceID = T2.InstanceID
			   AND T1.CollectDate = T2.CollectDate
			 GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.Drive
	       ) AS dku2
	  ON dku2.InstanceID = dku.InstanceID AND dku2.Drive = dku.Drive    
    LEFT JOIN (
      SELECT 'F:\' AS Drive, 409597 AS TotalSpaceMB
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'G:\' AS Drive, 153597 AS TotalSpaceMB
    ) dt ON dku.Drive = dt.Drive AND dku.InstanceID = 21				
    WHERE ins.UseYN = 'Y'
  	AND ins.ServerName IN($ServerName)
  	AND $__timeFilter(dku.CollectDate) 
  	AND dku.CollectDate > CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(YEAR, -3, GETDATE()), 121)
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, dku.CollectDate) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0), ins.ServerName, dku.Drive

    SELECT @TEXT = STUFF((SELECT DISTINCT ',"' + SVR_Drive +'"'
                            FROM #TempResult
                          ORDER BY 1 DESC
                          FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')

    SET @sSQL += '
        SELECT * 
          FROM #TempResult
         PIVOT (MAX(DiskUtilization) FOR SVR_Drive IN (' + @TEXT + ')) AS PVT
         ORDER BY 1'


    SET @nSQL = @sSQL

    EXEC SP_EXECUTESQL @nSQL

SELECT B.CollectDate as time
	 , A.ServerName +'  ' + B.databaseName as databaseName
	 , B.TotalSizeMB/1024 as TotalSizeMB
  FROM [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo]  A
 INNER JOIN [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[TB_DataSizeGrowth_S] B 
    ON A.InstanceID = B.instanceID
 INNER JOIN (
			SELECT T1.InstanceID
			      ,T1.databaseName
			  FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage] T1
			      ,(
				      SELECT InstanceID
						        ,MAX(CollectDate) AS CollectDate
					    FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage]
					   WHERE 1=1
					     AND $__timeFilter(CollectDate) 
					   GROUP BY InstanceID
				   ) T2
			 WHERE T1.InstanceID = T2.InstanceID
			   AND T1.CollectDate = T2.CollectDate
			 GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.databaseName
	       ) dku2
		ON dku2.InstanceID = B.InstanceID AND dku2.databaseName = B.databaseName
 WHERE B.databaseName NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb')
   AND a.ServerName IN ($ServerName)
   AND $__timeFilter(B.CollectDate) 
   AND A.UseYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY time

SELECT B.CollectDate as time
	 , A.ServerName +'  ' + B.databaseName as databaseName
	 , B.UsedSizeMB/1024 as UsedSizeMB 
  FROM [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo]  A
 INNER JOIN [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[TB_DataSizeGrowth_S] B 
    ON A.InstanceID = B.instanceID
 INNER JOIN (
			SELECT T1.InstanceID
			      ,T1.databaseName
			  FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage] T1
			      ,(
				      SELECT InstanceID
						        ,MAX(CollectDate) AS CollectDate
					    FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage]
					   WHERE 1=1
					     AND $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
					   GROUP BY InstanceID
				   ) T2
			 WHERE T1.InstanceID = T2.InstanceID
			   AND T1.CollectDate = T2.CollectDate
			 GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.databaseName
	       ) AS dku2
	  ON dku2.InstanceID = B.InstanceID AND dku2.databaseName = B.databaseName    
 WHERE $__timeFilter(B.CollectDate) 
   AND B.databaseName NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb')
   AND A.ServerName IN ($ServerName)		
   AND A.UseYN = 'Y'	
ORDER BY time

SELECT B.CollectDate as time,
	   A.ServerName +'  ' + B.databaseName as databaseName,
	   B.TotalSizeMB/1024 as TotalSizeMB
	FROM [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo]  A
		INNER JOIN [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[TB_LogSizeGrowth_S]  B
		ON A.InstanceID = B.instanceID
		AND $__timeFilter(B.CollectDate) 
		AND B.databaseName NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb')
		AND a.ServerName IN($ServerName)
		AND A.UseYN = 'Y'
 INNER JOIN (
			SELECT T1.InstanceID
			      ,T1.databaseName
			  FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage] T1
			      ,(
				      SELECT InstanceID
						        ,MAX(CollectDate) AS CollectDate
					    FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage]
					   WHERE 1=1
					     AND $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
					   GROUP BY InstanceID
				   ) T2
			 WHERE T1.InstanceID = T2.InstanceID
			   AND T1.CollectDate = T2.CollectDate
			 GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.databaseName
	       ) AS dku2
	  ON dku2.InstanceID = B.InstanceID AND dku2.databaseName = B.databaseName		
order by time

SELECT B.CollectDate as time,
	   A.ServerName +'  ' + B.databaseName as databaseName,
	   B.UsedSizeMB/1024 as UsedSizeMB 
	FROM [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo]  A
		INNER JOIN [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[TB_LogSizeGrowth_S]  B
		ON A.InstanceID = B.instanceID
		AND $__timeFilter(B.CollectDate) 
		AND B.databaseName NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb')
		AND a.ServerName IN($ServerName)
		AND A.UseYN = 'Y'
 INNER JOIN (
			SELECT T1.InstanceID
			      ,T1.databaseName
			  FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage] T1
			      ,(
				      SELECT InstanceID
						        ,MAX(CollectDate) AS CollectDate
					    FROM [TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage]
					   WHERE 1=1
					     AND $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
					   GROUP BY InstanceID
				   ) T2
			 WHERE T1.InstanceID = T2.InstanceID
			   AND T1.CollectDate = T2.CollectDate
			 GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.databaseName
	       ) AS dku2
	  ON dku2.InstanceID = B.InstanceID AND dku2.databaseName = B.databaseName		
order by time

UNION

list.definition:
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) < 1*60*24 THEN 1
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  1*60*24 AND   2*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 2  *60*24 THEN 30
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  2*60*24 AND  30*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 30 *60*24 THEN 60
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN 30*60*24 AND 365*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 365*60*24 THEN 180
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) >= 365*60*24 THEN 720
        END
list.name: TimeRangeGroup
list.query:
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) < 1*60*24 THEN 1
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  1*60*24 AND   2*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 2  *60*24 THEN 30
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  2*60*24 AND  30*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 30 *60*24 THEN 60
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN 30*60*24 AND 365*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 365*60*24 THEN 180
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) >= 365*60*24 THEN 720
        END
